# GCP Template Forge

> Autonomous GKE template generator. An AI agent (Jetski) takes a GitHub Issue describing a desired GKE architecture and produces validated Terraform+Helm and Config Connector templates for production-grade GKE deployments. Templates are validated by deploying real infrastructure to GCP, running a live workload health check, and tearing down cleanly.

## Primary Agent Instructions

- [GEMINI.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fkc1e100/gcp-template-forge/main/GEMINI.md) — Full agent operating guide: workflow, guardrails, template structure, CI/CD, networking, GPU/ML patterns, KCC patterns, infrastructure architecture
- [Structured Spec & Reference Repos](.gemini/user-instructions.json) — Machine-readable spec with reference repository list, sandbox constraints, handler config

## Templates

- [basic-gke-hello-world](templates/basic-gke-hello-world/) — Minimal GKE cluster with HTTP workload; reference implementation for new templates
- [enterprise-gke](templates/enterprise-gke/) — Private GKE cluster with VPC, Cloud NAT, Workload Identity, security posture
- [latest-gke-features](templates/latest-gke-features/) — Advanced GKE features (Gateway API, NAP, Native Sidecars, Image Streaming, Security Posture)
- [gke-topology-aware-routing](templates/gke-topology-aware-routing/) — Cost-optimized egress via Topology-Aware Routing and Gateway API
- [gke-fqdn-egress-security](templates/gke-fqdn-egress-security/) — Zero-Trust AI egress security via FQDN Network Policies (Enterprise feature)
- [gke-kuberay-kueue-multitenant](templates/gke-kuberay-kueue-multitenant/) — Multi-tenant Ray on GKE with equitable GPU queuing via Kueue (KubeRay + Kueue)

## External Documentation (fetch before writing code)

- [Terraform GKE Module Docs](https://registry.terraform.io/modules/terraform-google-modules/kubernetes-engine/google/latest)
- [KCC Resource Samples](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/k8s-config-connector/tree/master/config/samples/resources)
- [GKE Docs](https://cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs)
- [Terraform Google Provider](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/google/latest/docs)
- [GKE Accelerated Platforms](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/accelerated-platforms) — GPU, DWS, LLM inference blueprints
- [GKE Inference Quickstart](https://cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs/how-to/ai-profiles) — gcloud container ai profiles commands

## CI/CD

- GitHub Actions workflow: `.github/workflows/sandbox-validation.yml`
- TF state bucket: `gs://gke-gca-2025-forge-tf-state/templates/<name>/terraform-helm/`
- KCC target cluster: `krmapihost-kcc-instance` in `forge-management` namespace
- CI service account: `forge-builder@gca-gke-2025.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
- WIF provider: `projects/764460891170/locations/global/workloadIdentityPools/github-actions/providers/github`

## Operator & Sandbox Infrastructure

- Operator cluster: GKE cluster in `gca-gke-2025`, `us-central1`
- Dashboard: `https://34.30.138.59/` (pr-review-api, Envoy Gateway)
- Robot account: `codebot-sfle` (GitHub bot that commits/PRs on behalf of the agent)
- Issue sandboxes run in namespace: `fkcurrie` (dashboard user) or `fkc1e100` (primary)
- Sandbox image: `ghcr.io/gke-labs/gemini-for-kubernetes-development/generic-golang:latest`
